lesson: Debugger verification test
Moved worker prompts from n5_launch_worker.py to Prompts/Workers/*.prompt.md for better maintainability (Inverted Intelligence).
Added submit/review/approve workflow to build_orchestrator_v2.py to formalize the Validation Loop.
Implemented n5_verify_completion.py as a Semantic Gatekeeper to enforce artifact existence and syntax before submission.
Refactored spawn_worker.py to use LLM-provided JSON context instead of regex parsing SESSION_STATE, eliminating 'Not specified' errors.
Tally API integration was expunged. Ensure future integrations are strictly scoped to avoid sprawling references and deep dependencies across system components.
Short.io QR generation returns HTTP 201; updated scripts to handle this. Centralized QR storage to N5/assets/qr_codes.
SQLite COALESCE is essential for time-series analytics on sparse data
Scheduled agents interacting with multi-account Google Calendar require explicit email parameter

Persona System Upgrade: Canonical briefs now live in Documents/System/personas/*.md. Legacy YAML specs in Inbox/ are marked legacy. Added Vibe Operator and Vibe Level Upper briefs. Implemented compatibility shells for deprecated personas (Debugger v1, Thinker).
Notion API integration via Pipedream is more reliable than scraping Notion (JS rendering). For diff-based link generation, diff on Notion page IDs first, then fetch full properties only for new IDs.
When creating short.io links via shortio_link_service CLI, treat JSON output containing success=true and shortURL as success; do not rely only on 'Created:' stdout string.

Zapier webhook outages can be caused by local service workdir drift (cleanup moved /home/workspace/webhook-receiver). Add health-check + integrity check that verifies service workdir exists and service is returning 200 on /health; alert before Cloudflare starts returning origin/cache errors.
Weekly folder organization for meetings (Week-of-YYYY-MM-DD) is superior to flat state-based naming ([M]/[P]). File system organization beats manual state flags when UI alternatives fail.
Created .n5ignored marker system (parallel to .n5protected) for marking directories as non-existent. Folders with .n5ignored are excluded from index rebuilds and treated as archived/deprecated.

Persona Architecture Upgrade: Decoupled rich methodology from persona prompts. Personas now reference external workflow files in N5/prefs/workflows/ for deep context (e.g., researcher_workflow.md) while keeping the system prompt lightweight. Validated this pattern works for Strategist, Researcher, Teacher, Writer, and Debugger.
Enforce file provenance in frontmatter to trace rogue agent outputs.
Surgically edit scheduled agents to forbid specific file outputs (e.g. digests) rather than deleting the agent.
Fireflies webhook processor must explicitly check for renamed folders (suffixes _[M], _[P], etc.) to prevent duplicate folder creation during reprocessing.

Consolidated content library and embedding storage: Content Library now uses single canonical DB (N5/data/content_library.db) and semantic search uses brain.db as the only embedding layer; vestigial DBs/scripts/backups removed to reduce complexity and risk.
Raw JSON storage for enrichment is critical for audit trails. Staging directories allow non-destructive persistence separate from permanent markdown intel.
Aviato enricher returns dict, not tuple. Worker must adapt unpacking signature when calling enricher APIs.
Null-check guards essential when mapping API responses. NoneType iteration errors occur when fields like school_name are null. Use `field or default_value` pattern.

CRM v3 enrichment worker drifted from enricher API contract (tuple→dict), causing silent enrichment backlog. Add contract tests + keep raw JSON persistence separate from distilled intel so pipelines can reprocess without rewriting human-facing notes.

Scheduler tasks: avoid embedding Level Upper/checkpoint boilerplate in simple single-action agents; gate it behind a complexity threshold to reduce token waste while preserving safety for high-risk workflows.

Zapier/Granola inbound webhook failures can present as Cloudflare 520 when the origin service workdir is missing; fix by restoring the service workdir and restarting the user service, then re-test Zapier placeholders/field mappings.

Content Library + shortlink corrections should always verify canonical DB and any deprecated configs, not just current JSON or prompts, to avoid stale trial URLs or phantom links like SHRM supplement.

Scheduled check-in SMS quality degraded after removing Level Upper-style composition: hardcoded script calls produced detached, checklist-like messages. Fix pattern: keep mechanical guarantee (exactly one SMS) but include explicit human-voice composition instruction (warmth/relationship depth) before sending.
